name: [ES-CMP][V3] Process Work Request Details

parameters.name: Event Type
parameters.description: get 'event_type' from the es-cmp-extract-webhook-event-info agent output object.

parameters.name: Request ID
parameters.description: get 'request_id' from the es-cmp-extract-webhook-event-info agent output object.

description: process work request details in order to create task/s from it.
prompt_template:
## Input

1. You will receive two variables:
   1. [[Event Type]]​
   2. [[Request ID]]​
2. Define template_mapping:

```
{
    "Social Organic": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Social Organic (MARKETING)",
    "workflow_id": "6852e8791dd1e03b8e2856d3",
    "title_prefix_1": "Social Organic:",
    "channel_field": "Social Media Account",
    "channel_extraction_rule": "before_colon"
  },
    "Social Paid": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Social paid (MARKETING)",
    "workflow_id": "6908bc7f42a129af861c64b7",
    "title_prefix_1": "Social Paid:",
    "channel_field": "Social Media Account",
    "channel_extraction_rule": "before_colon"
  },
    "Web requests (MARKETING)": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Webpage (MARKETING)",
    "workflow_id": "6908bc2242a129af861af1d5",
    "title_prefix_1": "Webpage:",
    "channel_field": null,
    "channel_extraction_rule": null
  },
    "Event Request": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Event (BETA)",
    "workflow_id": "67e40c557ef1a32071735a61",
    "title_prefix_1": "Event:",
    "channel_field": null,
    "channel_extraction_rule": null
  },
    "Email Marketing": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Email",
    "workflow_id": "60460415ac2c1a0459c3684a",
    "title_prefix_1": "Email:",
    "channel_field": null,
    "channel_extraction_rule": null
  },
    "Event Info Capture": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Event (BETA)",
    "workflow_id": "67e40c557ef1a32071735a61",
    "title_prefix_1": "Event:",
    "channel_field": null,
    "channel_extraction_rule": null
  },
    "Graphic Design": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Graphic Design",
    "workflow_id": "6908bd3042a129af861d7000",
    "title_prefix_1": "Graphic:",
    "channel_field": null,
    "channel_extraction_rule": null
  },
    "Sales Enablement Asset": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Sales Enablement Asset",
    "workflow_id": "68fa02a6ce4308b8e76aa846",
    "title_prefix_1": "Sales Asset:",
    "channel_field": null,
    "channel_extraction_rule": null
  },
    "Trade Media": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Trade media (MARKETING)",
    "workflow_id": "68810314f5a803237b0a34e7",
    "title_prefix_1": "Trade Media:",
    "channel_field": "Social Media Account",
    "channel_extraction_rule": "before_colon"
  },
    "Video Production": {
    "workflow_name": "Workflow: Video Production",
    "workflow_id": "6908bd4d42a129af861d8a69",
    "title_prefix_1": "Video:",
    "channel_field": null,
    "channel_extraction_rule": null
  }
}
```

---

## Process

 1. call `get_cmp_resource` with :

    1. resource_type = "work_request"
    2. resource_id = [[Request ID]]
    3. let wr = output

 2. ​extract from wr :

    1. template_name
    2. title
    3. work_request_status
    4. assignee_name
    5. assignee_id
    6. form_fields

 3. IF template_name not in template_mapping, return {"proceed_status" : "Declined"}

 4. ELSE, from template_mapping[template_name], extract :

    1. workflow_id
    2. workflow_name
    3. title_prefix_1
    4. channel_field
    5. channel_extraction_rule
    6. IF channel_field is null, channel_value = null
    7. ELSE raw_channel = form_fields[channel_field]
       1. IF raw_channel is null, channel_value = null
       2. ELSE
          1. IF channel_extraction_rule == "before_colon":
             1. Split raw_channel on ":" and take the text before the first colon.
             2. Trim spaces. Example: "LinkedIn: Social Post" → "LinkedIn"
             3. let channel_value = this trimmed value
          2. ELSE channel_value = raw_channel

 5. IF channel_value is null, task_title = "{title_prefix_1} {title}"

 6. ELSE, task_title = "{title_prefix_1} {channel_value} {title}"

 7. IF work_request_status == "Accepted" and workflow_id is not null and template_name exists in template_mapping, \
    proceed_status = "Accepted"

 8. ELSE, return {"proceed_status" : "Declined"}

 9. let campaign_value = form_fields["Campaign"]

    1. IF not campaign_value, campaign_value = "[ES-CMP] Test Opal Usecase - Campaign"

10. let due_date = form_fields["Deliverable Due Date"]

    1. IF not due_date, due_date = form_fields["Event End Date"]
       1. IF not due_date, due_date = form_fields["End Date"]

11. return output object below :

    ```
    {
      "proceed_status": proceed_status,
      "work_request_id": [[Request ID]]​,
      "template_name": template_name,
      "workflow_id": workflow_id,
      "workflow_name": workflow_name,
      "status": work_request_status,
      "assignee_name": assignee_name,
      "assignee_id": assignee_id,
      "campaign": campaign_value,
      "supporting_activity": form_fields["Supporting Activity"],
      "due_date": due_date,
      "channel": channel_value,
      "task_title": task_title
    }
    ```
